name: ◁ VERMICELLI NOODLE SALAD BOWL WITH FERMENTED SAUCE

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons fermented soybean sauce
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons fermented soybean sauce

ingredients.item: ½ cup (120 ml) water
ingredients.original: ½ cup (120 ml) water

ingredients.item: ½ cup (77 g) roughly chopped pineapple
ingredients.original: ½ cup (77 g) roughly chopped pineapple

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil

ingredients.item: 1 leek (white part only), thinly sliced, plus 1 tablespoon, minced, divided
ingredients.original: 1 leek (white part only), thinly sliced, plus 1 tablespoon, minced, divided

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon minced lemongrass
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced lemongrass

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons annatto oil
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons annatto oil

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon sugar, plus more to taste
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon sugar, plus more to taste

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item:
TOPPINGS AND NOODLES
½ cup (120 ml) vegetable oil
1 block (14 ounces/400 g) firm tofu, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes
ingredients.original:
TOPPINGS AND NOODLES
½ cup (120 ml) vegetable oil
1 block (14 ounces/400 g) firm tofu, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes

ingredients.item: 10½ ounces (300 g) fresh young jackfruit or breadfruit, peeled, or canned jackfruit, drained
ingredients.original: 10½ ounces (300 g) fresh young jackfruit or breadfruit, peeled, or canned jackfruit, drained

ingredients.item: 10 ounces (283 g) dried rice vermicelli noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh rice vermicelli noodles
ingredients.original: 10 ounces (283 g) dried rice vermicelli noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh rice vermicelli noodles

ingredients.item: 10½ ounces (300 g) leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn
ingredients.original: 10½ ounces (300 g) leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) fresh green herbs (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) fresh green herbs (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons annatto oil
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons annatto oil

ingredients.item: ½ cup (72 g) crushed roasted peanuts
ingredients.original: ½ cup (72 g) crushed roasted peanuts

ingredients.item: 1. MAKE THE SAUCE In a blender, combine the chao cubes, chao brine, fermented soybean sauce, and water and process until smooth. Add pineapple and process into a coarse purée.
ingredients.original: 1. MAKE THE SAUCE In a blender, combine the chao cubes, chao brine, fermented soybean sauce, and water and process until smooth. Add pineapple and process into a coarse purée.

ingredients.item: 2. In a small skillet, heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek slices and cook and stir until golden (about 2 minutes). Leaving the oil in the skillet, use a slotted spoon to transfer fried leek to a small bowl and set aside.
ingredients.original: 2. In a small skillet, heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek slices and cook and stir until golden (about 2 minutes). Leaving the oil in the skillet, use a slotted spoon to transfer fried leek to a small bowl and set aside.

ingredients.item: 3. Put skillet over medium-low heat, add minced leek, lemongrass, and 2 tablespoons of annatto oil, and cook and stir until fragrant (about 2 minutes). Add puréed mixture, sugar, and stock powder to pan, and simmer until bubbling (2 to 3 more minutes). Add more sugar if needed to get an equal balance of sweet and savory.
ingredients.original: 3. Put skillet over medium-low heat, add minced leek, lemongrass, and 2 tablespoons of annatto oil, and cook and stir until fragrant (about 2 minutes). Add puréed mixture, sugar, and stock powder to pan, and simmer until bubbling (2 to 3 more minutes). Add more sugar if needed to get an equal balance of sweet and savory.

ingredients.item: 4. MAKE THE TOPPINGS AND NOODLES In a medium skillet, heat ½ cup (120 ml) of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add tofu cubes and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain.
ingredients.original: 4. MAKE THE TOPPINGS AND NOODLES In a medium skillet, heat ½ cup (120 ml) of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add tofu cubes and cook until golden brown on all sides (10 to 15 minutes). Transfer to a cooling rack or paper towel–lined plate to drain.

ingredients.item: 5. If using fresh young jackfruit, place it in a small saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and cook until soft enough to be skewered with a fork or chopstick (20 to 25 minutes for fresh or 15 minutes for canned; if using breadfruit, boil for 10 to 15 minutes). Remove from heat, allow to cool, and then cut jackfruit into thin slices. Stack the slices on top of each other and cut along the grain into julienned strips (see Note).
ingredients.original: 5. If using fresh young jackfruit, place it in a small saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil and cook until soft enough to be skewered with a fork or chopstick (20 to 25 minutes for fresh or 15 minutes for canned; if using breadfruit, boil for 10 to 15 minutes). Remove from heat, allow to cool, and then cut jackfruit into thin slices. Stack the slices on top of each other and cut along the grain into julienned strips (see Note).

ingredients.item: 6. If using dried vermicelli noodles, cook them following the instructions on the package.
ingredients.original: 6. If using dried vermicelli noodles, cook them following the instructions on the package.

ingredients.item: 7. Fill each serving bowl one-third with lettuce and herbs, and then add cooked vermicelli noodles on top. Place a few pieces of fried tofu and 2 tablespoons of jackfruit on top.
ingredients.original: 7. Fill each serving bowl one-third with lettuce and herbs, and then add cooked vermicelli noodles on top. Place a few pieces of fried tofu and 2 tablespoons of jackfruit on top.

ingredients.item: 8. Drizzle the sauce and 2 tablespoons of annatto oil over the top, sprinkle with roasted peanuts and fried leek, toss, and serve.
ingredients.original: 8. Drizzle the sauce and 2 tablespoons of annatto oil over the top, sprinkle with roasted peanuts and fried leek, toss, and serve.
